name: Orqa DTK APB
description: Single-board platform combining STM32H7 flight controller with NXP i.MX8M Plus companion computer. Collapses the traditional FC + separate companion model into one board. NPU (2.3 TOPS) enables onboard AI, vision processing, and autonomous operation. PCIe expansion slot for DTK ecosystem modules. Primary development hardware for AI Wingman onboard intelligence layer.
companion_processor: NXP i.MX8M Plus (4× Cortex-A53 @ 1.8 GHz + Cortex-M7 @ 800 MHz co-proc)
wingman_role: Primary onboard AI development platform — FC + companion + NPU inference in one board

name: ModalAI VOXL 2
description: Blue UAS Framework listed integrated AI flight stack. Qualcomm QRB5165 with PX4 running directly on the DSP — no separate FC required. 15+ TOPS AI compute (Hexagon HTA + GPU + DSP + NPU), 8 GB LPDDR5, 7 concurrent MIPI-CSI cameras. VIO, obstacle avoidance, SLAM, ROS 2, Docker, TensorFlow Lite onboard. Only 16g. Assembled in USA.
companion_processor: Qualcomm QRB5165 (8 cores up to 3.09 GHz)
npu: Qualcomm Hexagon HTA + GPU + DSP + NPU

name: ModalAI VOXL 2 Mini
description: Ultra-miniaturized VOXL 2 on a 42×42mm board with 30.5mm mounting pattern. Same QRB5165 and 15+ TOPS AI as VOXL 2 in an 11g package. Four MIPI-CSI camera inputs, supports up to 5 image sensors including 8K30. PX4 on DSP. Purpose-built for micro-drone AI where every gram matters.
companion_processor: Qualcomm QRB5165 (8 cores up to 3.09 GHz)
npu: Qualcomm Hexagon HTA + GPU + DSP + NPU

name: Auterion Skynode S
description: All-in-one autopilot and mission computer on a 30.5mm board. FMUv6x FC (STM32H7) + dedicated NPU mission computer in a chip-down design. Blue UAS Framework listed. Single connection to most quad ESCs (signals and power, up to 8 motors/servos). Works out-of-the-box with USB cameras, supports 2 MIPI cameras. Runs AuterionOS (PX4-based), deploying AI/CV apps via app store model. Combat-proven in Ukraine. Direct 8S LiPo/LiIon input without power module.
companion_processor: Dedicated NPU mission computer (custom Auterion chip-down design)
camera_inputs: 2× MIPI CSI + USB cameras (out of box)
expansion: 8× motor/servo outputs, standard 30.5mm mount, payload connectors

name: ARK FPV Flight Controller
description: NDAA-compliant FPV flight controller based on ARKV6X in a 30.5mm pattern. STM32H743 at 480 MHz, industrial IIM-42653 IMU, barometer, magnetometer. 3–12S battery input with regulated 12V 2A output for VTX and payloads — the key differentiator for FPV builds. Ships with PX4, also supports ArduPilot and Betaflight. Blue UAS Framework listed. Made in USA in ISO9001/AS9001D facilities. 1W heater for cold-weather ops. Not a companion computer — included here as the FPV-optimized NDAA alternative to Orqa FC stack.
connectivity: USB-C, PWM, UART, SPI, CAN, I2C, MicroSD
note: FC only — no companion computer. Categorized here as the Blue UAS Framework FPV-optimized NDAA alternative alongside integrated stacks.
